ddls:
CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "slice_name" TEXT /* Name of the slice for the procedure */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alternative names for the procedure */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the procedure */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value applicable to the procedure */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value applicable to the procedure */,
  "must_support" INTEGER /* Indicates if the procedure must support certain features */,
  "is_modifier" INTEGER /* Specifies if the procedure is a modifier */,
  "is_summary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the procedure is a summary */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the procedure */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the procedure */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition providing detailed information about the procedure */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the procedure */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for the procedure */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the procedure field */,
  "procedure_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure was performed */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the patient on whom the procedure was performed */,
  "performer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the healthcare provider who performed the procedure */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the procedure (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the procedure was performed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the procedure */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the procedure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the procedure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the procedure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_performer_id FOREIGN KEY ("performer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meta_data" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated procedure */,
  "version_id" TEXT /* Version identifier for the procedure metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "implicit_rules" TEXT /* Rules followed when constructing the metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the metadata */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the metadata */,
  "security_label" TEXT /* Security label to control access to the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meta_data_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meta_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meta_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* IETF language tag for the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Full name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procedure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the procedure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slicing" (
  "slice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the slice */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the procedure being sliced */,
  "discriminator" TEXT /* Discriminator used for slicing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the slice */,
  "ordered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the slice is ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slicing_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_paths" (
  "base_path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the base path */,
  "path_name" TEXT /* Name of the base path */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum value applicable to the base path */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum value applicable to the base path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the constraint */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the procedure */,
  "constraint_description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the constraint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the constraint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraints_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the procedure */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., Workflow Pattern, RIM Mapping) */,
  "mapping_details" TEXT /* Details regarding the mapping */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the standard to which the mapping applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the procedure being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the procedure related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the reminder */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procedure for which the reminder is set */,
  "reminder_text" TEXT /* Text of the reminder */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reminder is due */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reminder has been completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)
